ab: qanengi iku pasanu timaisuan ni?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: qanengi ti, semulul iku.
ch: B:可以的，我很願意。
en: B: Yes, I would love to.

ab: qanengi iku pasanu timaisuan ni?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: naRin, mai muwaza qenasuppaR ku.
ch: B:不要，我所知道的不多。
en: B:Don't, I don't know much about it.

ab: yau lawad su qemadanan ni? ngid iku qatiw pasanu timaisuan qanengi ni?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I'd like to visit you, is that okay?

ab: kua, palana ka isu ta leppawan.
ch: B:好，我會在家等你。
en: B: Okay, I'll wait for you at home.

ab: yau lawad su temawaR ni? ngid iku pasanu timaisuan tu masang ay kungku na kebalan.
ch: A:你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於噶瑪蘭族的傳說故事。
en: A: Are you free tomorrow? I would like to ask you about the legendary story of the Kavalan tribe.

ab: qatiw pa iku sa naung temawaR, mai ta leppawan yu.
ch: B:明天我要去山上，不在家喔。
en: B: I'm going to the mountains tomorrow, so I won't be home.

ab: mipil iku suppaR isu tu masang ay wawaway na kebalan, ngid iku pasanu timaisuan.
ch: A:我聽說您對噶瑪蘭族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
en: A: I have heard that you know a lot about the traditional customs of the Kavalan people and I would like to ask you a few questions.

ab: mai muwaza qenasuppaR ku, wanayka sanu iku tu suppaRan ku ay.
ch: B:我所了解的不多，但是我會盡量回答。
en: B: I don't know much about it, but I will try to answer as best I can.

ab: ngid iku pasanu qanengi iku meningu ni? nazau qusazui qasuppaR pa iku semudad.
ch: A:請問我可以錄影嗎?這樣以後比較容易記錄。
en: A: Can I record the video? It will be easier to record in the future.

ab: kua ya, mai tu niana lanas.
ch: B:好的，沒問題。
en: B: Okay, no problem.

ab: ngid iku pasanu utani ti tasaw su setangi?
ch: A:請問您今年幾歲了?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: usiwa betin yau uwalu ti tasaw ku setangi.
ch: B:我已經98歲了。
en: B: I'm 98 years old.

ab: sining pama isu taytan.
ch: A:您看起來很年輕。
en: A: You look very young.

ab: mai nayau! baqian ti iku.
ch: B:沒有啦!我已經老了。
en: B: No, I'm not! I'm old.

ab: ngid iku pasanu maqezi isu tanian mawtu?
ch: A:請問您來自哪裡?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: maqezi iku ta pateRungan mawtu.
ch: B:我來自新社。
en: B: I am from the New Agency.

ab: ngid iku pasanu kebalan tisin su qaya ni?
ch: A:請問您的太太也是噶瑪蘭族人嗎?
en: A: Is your wife also a Kavalan?

ab: ussa, puyuma ay lazat aizipna.
ch: B:不，她是卑南族人。
en: B:No, she's a Puyuma.

ab: suppaR isu tu utani sikawman?
ch: A:您會說哪些語言?
en: A: What languages do you speak?

ab: suppaR iku tu kizaya seRay puyuma ay sikawman.
ch: B: 我會說阿美語和卑南語。
en: B: I speak Aramaic and Puyuma.

ab: qalizaqan setangi pasanu timaisuan, qanengi isu semanu tu pelisin na semalaw ni?
ch: A:今天很高興能訪問您，您可以談有關狩獵的禁忌嗎?
en: A: It's a pleasure to interview you today. Can you talk about the taboos of hunting?

ab: kua ya. sining pama iku pataz matiw sa nangun semalaw.
ch: B:好的。我年輕的時候很常上山打獵。
en: B: Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

ab: wanay, nitudan su setangi maken nengi.
ch: A:謝謝，您今天所教導的真是太棒了。
en: A: Thank you, what you taught me today was really great.

ab: nisanuan ku nizu maken ay, nisasanuan na baqian masang.
ch: B:我所説的都是千真萬確的，祖先所流傳的講述。
en: B: All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

ab: tuzus ma tazian nisikawman setangi, wanay tu nipaqsuppaR su.
ch: A:今天的訪談就到這邊。非常謝謝您的分享。
en: A: That's all for today's interview. Thank you very much for sharing with us.

ab: naRin mesikaz, qumni si sidadak pa ita muman.
ch: B:不客氣，有機會我們再聊。
en: B: You're welcome, we'll talk again when we have the chance.

ab: qawi ti iku, muman si qanengi mipil tu qamuwaza kungku.
ch: A:我要離開了，期待下次聽到更多的故事。
en: A: I'm going to leave now and look forward to hearing more stories next time.

ab: nengi ti! paqanas ka semaqay.
ch: B:好的!請慢走。
en: B: Okay! Please take care.
